---
description: Workspace instructions for the Coding DSA repository
---

This workspace contains only DSA problem code.

- Keep responses concise and short.
- Avoid extra explanation unless it adds important context.
- Use simple, direct language.
- Prefer bullet points or a brief paragraph.
- Answer only what is asked.
- Use code examples only when they clarify a solution.
- Do not waste tokens on redundant details.
- Focus on correctness, efficiency, and clarity.
